name: South Africa VAT Settings Form Tour

steps.description: Start by selecting the company these VAT settings belong to. The reporting-company compatibility field will follow automatically.
steps.label: Company
steps.title: Company Scope

steps.description: Map the output VAT ledger that should collect South African sales VAT.
steps.label: Output VAT Account
steps.title: Output VAT

steps.description: Map the input VAT ledger used for deductible South African purchase VAT. This can be the same control account in legacy South African setups.
steps.label: Input VAT Account
steps.title: Input VAT

steps.description: Select an optional ERPNext tax account for automatic Item Tax Template generation. Leave it blank if you do not want the templates created automatically.
steps.label: Item Tax Template Account
steps.title: Item Tax Templates

title: South Africa VAT Settings Form Tour
